calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gener Benitez for Administrator Aprea Bates.

Mr. Benitez apologizes to the court for receiving $2,630.50 from the estate as extraordinary fees without prior court approval, and admits that this was the fault of the law firm and no fault of the administrator. After hearing Mr. Benitez's explaination, the court informs counsel that the unauthorized payment of $2,630.50 will be deducted from the attorneys' statutory fees of $24,962.15. The court takes the petition under submission with intent to allow (but not approve) the final account and report, allow the $24,962.15 in statutory fees to the attorneys (subject to the $2,630.50 deduction), and grant the remaining relief as prayed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Continued To Nov-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Continued To Jul-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gener Benitez appeared by zoom for and with Aprea Bates (petitioner0 in person.
Robin Bates appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mr. Benitez stated that he saw the probate examiner's notes, that a proposed order was submitted yesterday, and that Robin Bates was notified by telephone, but formal notice was not provided. The court informed Mr. Benitez that formal notice is required. The court also explained to Aprea Bates that it cannot approve the report on status of administration because proper notice has not been provided. Aprea Bates expressed concern about her counsel having missed providing notices. The Report on Status of Administration and Petition for More Time to Close the Administration is continued to July 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Roger T. Picquet. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
